args: if [ -z "${CODEX_OBSIDIAN_VAULT:-}" ]; then echo "Set CODEX_OBSIDIAN_VAULT to the local Obsidian vault path" >&2; exit 1; fi; NPX="$(command -v npx || true)"; if [ -z "$NPX" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/npx" ]; then NPX="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/npx"; fi; if [ -z "$NPX" ]; then echo "npx not found" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$NPX" -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem@2026.1.14 "$CODEX_OBSIDIAN_VAULT"
